news.title:
West Asia tensions caused gas stocks like Petronet, GAIL to fall up to 5%.
Experts warn weak Q4FY26 for oil & gas firms due to supply disruptions, rupee depreciation.
news.summary:
West Asia tensions caused gas stocks like Petronet, GAIL to fall up to 5%.
Experts warn weak Q4FY26 for oil & gas firms due to supply disruptions, rupee depreciation.

news.title:
Petronet LNG shares surged 9.1% amid hopes of a US-Iran ceasefire, trading at ₹278.39 on NSE.
The geopolitical deal boosted energy markets, stabilizing crude prices and improving investor sentiment in Petronet LNG.
news.summary:
Petronet LNG shares surged 9.1% amid hopes of a US-Iran ceasefire, trading at ₹278.39 on NSE.
The geopolitical deal boosted energy markets, stabilizing crude prices and improving investor sentiment in Petronet LNG.

news.title:
Petronet's Dahej LNG terminal faces low utilisation due to West Asia war cutting imports by half.
India's LNG facilities see lowest utilisation in years, per oil ministry and industry data.
news.summary:
Petronet's Dahej LNG terminal faces low utilisation due to West Asia war cutting imports by half.
India's LNG facilities see lowest utilisation in years, per oil ministry and industry data.

news.title:
Nomura warns OMCs like IOCL, BPCL, and HPCL face margin pressure from ATF, LPG price hikes, and subsidy burdens.
Petronet LNG expands capacity to 22.5 mtpa; RIL's SEZ refinery exempted from windfall tax, aiding margins.
news.summary:
Nomura warns OMCs like IOCL, BPCL, and HPCL face margin pressure from ATF, LPG price hikes, and subsidy burdens.
Petronet LNG expands capacity to 22.5 mtpa; RIL's SEZ refinery exempted from windfall tax, aiding margins.

news.title:
Petronet LNG Ltd has commissioned expanded LNG regasification facilities, increasing Dahej terminal capacity from 17.5 MMTPA to 22.5 MMTPA.
The commissioning was completed at 23:30 hrs on March 31, 2026, as per regulatory requirements.
news.summary:
Petronet LNG Ltd has commissioned expanded LNG regasification facilities, increasing Dahej terminal capacity from 17.5 MMTPA to 22.5 MMTPA.
The commissioning was completed at 23:30 hrs on March 31, 2026, as per regulatory requirements.

news.title:
Nomura maintains Buy on Petronet LNG with Rs 340 target, citing potential SP&A agreements.
Key drivers include 3% escalation, low regas cost (~5%), PNG support, and rising gas demand.
news.summary:
Nomura maintains Buy on Petronet LNG with Rs 340 target, citing potential SP&A agreements.
Key drivers include 3% escalation, low regas cost (~5%), PNG support, and rising gas demand.

news.title:
Cyclone Narelle disrupts Chevron and Woodside's LNG operations in Australia, impacting global supply.
Petronet LNG, GAIL, and IOCL may face indirect effects due to reliance on Australian LNG sources.
news.summary:
Cyclone Narelle disrupts Chevron and Woodside's LNG operations in Australia, impacting global supply.
Petronet LNG, GAIL, and IOCL may face indirect effects due to reliance on Australian LNG sources.

news.title:
CLSA notes Middle East war impacts stocks like ONGC, Oil India, Reliance, and OMCs differently.
Post-war, upstream firms like ONGC may gain, while OMCs face margin pressure if crude stays elevated.
news.summary:
CLSA notes Middle East war impacts stocks like ONGC, Oil India, Reliance, and OMCs differently.
Post-war, upstream firms like ONGC may gain, while OMCs face margin pressure if crude stays elevated.

news.title:
Crude oil prices dropped 10.1% to $96.06 after Trump paused Iran strikes; later rebounded to $101.
BPCL, HPCL, IOCL, RIL, and Petronet LNG secure LPG and crude shipments amid Hormuz tensions.
news.summary:
Crude oil prices dropped 10.1% to $96.06 after Trump paused Iran strikes; later rebounded to $101.
BPCL, HPCL, IOCL, RIL, and Petronet LNG secure LPG and crude shipments amid Hormuz tensions.

news.title:
Oil marketing stocks HPCL, BPCL, and Indian Oil plunged 25-30% due to the US-Iran war, with valuations below 5-year averages.
Gas stocks like Petronet LNG, GAIL, IGL, MGL, and Gujarat Gas dropped 11-27%, while ONGC and Oil India fell 3-4% but stayed above 5-year averages.
news.summary:
Oil marketing stocks HPCL, BPCL, and Indian Oil plunged 25-30% due to the US-Iran war, with valuations below 5-year averages.
Gas stocks like Petronet LNG, GAIL, IGL, MGL, and Gujarat Gas dropped 11-27%, while ONGC and Oil India fell 3-4% but stayed above 5-year averages.

news.title:
LNG disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz halve India's urea output, impacting plants' operations.
Petronet LNG declared force majeure as upstream suppliers failed to deliver contracted LNG volumes.
news.summary:
LNG disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz halve India's urea output, impacting plants' operations.
Petronet LNG declared force majeure as upstream suppliers failed to deliver contracted LNG volumes.

news.title:
Petronet LNG's board approves wholly-owned subsidiary for energy innovations.
The subsidiary will focus on startup support and sustainable business initiatives.
news.summary:
Petronet LNG's board approves wholly-owned subsidiary for energy innovations.
The subsidiary will focus on startup support and sustainable business initiatives.

news.title:
FirstCry, GMDC, and Petronet LNG emerge as key movers on Friday.
These stocks showed notable performance changes among 7 top movers.
news.summary:
FirstCry, GMDC, and Petronet LNG emerge as key movers on Friday.
These stocks showed notable performance changes among 7 top movers.

news.title:
Nomura cuts Petronet LNG's price target to ₹340 from ₹370, maintaining a 'buy' rating.
West Asia crisis impacts near-term volumes; FY27 EBITDA cut by 23%. Stock trades at ₹271.9, near 52-week low.
news.summary:
Nomura cuts Petronet LNG's price target to ₹340 from ₹370, maintaining a 'buy' rating.
West Asia crisis impacts near-term volumes; FY27 EBITDA cut by 23%. Stock trades at ₹271.9, near 52-week low.

news.title:
Petronet LNG, GAIL shares plunged after Qatar's Ras Laffan LNG facility damage raised global gas supply concerns.
Petronet LNG dropped 5.9%, GAIL fell 3.2%, amid fears of supply disruptions from the world's largest LNG export hub.
news.summary:
Petronet LNG, GAIL shares plunged after Qatar's Ras Laffan LNG facility damage raised global gas supply concerns.
Petronet LNG dropped 5.9%, GAIL fell 3.2%, amid fears of supply disruptions from the world's largest LNG export hub.

news.title:
West Asia crisis leads Petronet LNG, QatarEnergy to invoke force majeure.
Force majeure excuses contract obligations due to uncontrollable events.
news.summary:
West Asia crisis leads Petronet LNG, QatarEnergy to invoke force majeure.
Force majeure excuses contract obligations due to uncontrollable events.

news.title:
Petronet LNG Ltd paid fines to NSE and BSE for SEBI LODR non-compliance.
Fines amounted to Rs. 1.77 lakh each, paid post-TDS with transaction IDs provided.
news.summary:
Petronet LNG Ltd paid fines to NSE and BSE for SEBI LODR non-compliance.
Fines amounted to Rs. 1.77 lakh each, paid post-TDS with transaction IDs provided.

news.title:
Gas distribution stocks like GAIL, Petronet LNG, Indraprastha Gas surged as Trump hinted Iran conflict could end soon.
Sensex rose 621 points, Nifty gained 222 points; energy stocks rallied amid hopes of eased geopolitical tensions.
news.summary:
Gas distribution stocks like GAIL, Petronet LNG, Indraprastha Gas surged as Trump hinted Iran conflict could end soon.
Sensex rose 621 points, Nifty gained 222 points; energy stocks rallied amid hopes of eased geopolitical tensions.

news.title:
Elara Securities highlights India's 69% LNG import reliance on the Strait of Hormuz, posing risks to Petronet LNG, Gujarat Gas.
Petronet's Dahej terminal faces 76% Hormuz exposure; Gujarat Gas sees margin pressures with 73% LNG reliance.
news.summary:
Elara Securities highlights India's 69% LNG import reliance on the Strait of Hormuz, posing risks to Petronet LNG, Gujarat Gas.
Petronet's Dahej terminal faces 76% Hormuz exposure; Gujarat Gas sees margin pressures with 73% LNG reliance.

news.title:
Petronet LNG reports block trade of Rs. 32.3 Cr for 1,103,156 shares.
Shares traded at Rs. 292.85 each in the transaction.
news.summary:
Petronet LNG reports block trade of Rs. 32.3 Cr for 1,103,156 shares.
